creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #3)

For clarity: <https://cgit.freebsd.org/doc/commit/documentation/content/en/articles/committers-guide/_index.adoc?id=c7527916ede4e8f16d837c65f16d6e9404568b23> (2023-02-21) removed examples,
